overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior walking through a misty coastal fishing village in feudal Japan. The character moves from a riverside campsite through tall grass and white pampas flowers toward wooden village structures, with weather transitioning from morning fog to an approaching storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal fishing camp with cooking fire

agents.ego_description: samurai walking away from the campfire along the water's edge, passing a clothesline

entered.detail: wooden frame with hanging pots over a fire
simple wooden structure with dark cloth tarp
wooden poles with ropes holding hanging items
calm water with mist rising from the surface

segments.scene_description: The samurai begins at a riverside campsite with a cooking fire and wooden shelter, walking along a dirt path beside the misty water as fog obscures the distant trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall grass field along the riverbank

agents.ego_description: walking through dense tall grass with the river visible to the right and a wooden hut in the distance

entered.detail: lush green grass reaching waist height
small traditional structure with thatched roof

segments.scene_description: Moving through dense tall grass along the riverbank, leaving the campsite behind as a wooden fishing hut comes into view on the left and white flowers appear in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with white pampas grass overlooking the river

events.description: sun breaks through morning fog, illuminating the white pampas grass brightly

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through swaying white pampas grass toward a distant traditional building

entered.detail: tall white flowering grass swaying in the wind
large multi-tiered wooden structure with curved roofs
fast-moving water with white foam over rocks

segments.scene_description: Ascending a grassy hillside filled with white pampas grass that glows in the breaking sunlight, with a traditional Japanese temple visible in the distance and the river showing rapids below.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path leading into Kechi Fishing Village

events.description: sky darkens dramatically as storm clouds gather, shifting from bright to ominous grey

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path toward the village buildings as a storm approaches and the wind picks up

entered.detail: well-trodden brown earth path leading into the village
traditional wooden building with stacked goods outside
large woven baskets piled beside the path
dark grey storm clouds covering the sky

segments.scene_description: Walking on a dirt path into the fishing village with wooden huts and stacked baskets visible on the left, as the sky darkens to an ominous storm grey and the atmosphere becomes tense.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, misty riverside campsite that gradually transforms into a tense, storm-shrouded fishing village. It begins by following the samurai along a dirt path beside foggy waters and a cooking fire, moving steadily away from the shelter. As the camera pushes through dense riverbank grass, a wooden fishing hut emerges on the left while white flowers appear in the distance. The scene then ascends a hillside of glowing white pampas grass under breaking sunlight, revealing a traditional temple and rushing rapids below. Finally, the path leads directly into the village among wooden huts and stacked baskets as the bright light fades into an ominous, storm-grey sky.
